things.name: My Son Sanctuary
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Cham temple ruins in a jungle valley - Vietnam's Angkor Wat

things.name: Hoi An Ancient Town
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage lantern-lit trading port preserved from the 15th century

things.name: Ba Na Hills & Golden Bridge
things.description: Giant stone-hand Golden Bridge held up by moss-covered stone hands above the clouds

things.name: Marble Mountains
things.description: Five marble-and-limestone outcrops with Buddhist caves, shrines and sea views

things.name: My Khe Beach
things.description: Long white-sand beach that US soldiers called 'China Beach' - perfect swimming conditions

things.name: Dragon Bridge
things.description: Dragon-shaped bridge that breathes fire and water on weekend evenings

things.name: Museum of Cham Sculpture
things.description: World's finest collection of Cham art with sandstone sculptures from the 7th-15th centuries

things.name: Hai Van Pass
things.description: Dramatic mountain pass between Da Nang and Hue - Top Gear's most beautiful road

things.name: Son Tra Peninsula (Monkey Mountain)
things.description: Jungle peninsula with red-shanked douc langurs, beaches and Lady Buddha statue

things.name: Hue Imperial Citadel Day Trip
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage citadel of the last Nguyen emperors 90km north
